{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Sevenfold Archmage
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The ritual made the narrator a [[Sevenfold Archmage]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45">''The Captain'', chapter 45</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Sevenfold Archmage]] involves a seventh magic.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“You never used your seventh magic. No one saw it.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
